description: The dimension an Intensity target applies to (§5.13, v0.5) — the non-resistance 'how hard' axis. Resistance lives in Load (§5.12); perceived/derived effort in EffortLoad (§5.13).

tokens.label: Power
tokens.description: Mechanical power output (cycling, rowing, ski-erg); unit W.

tokens.label: Heart Rate
tokens.description: Target heart rate / HR zone; unit /min.

tokens.label: Speed
tokens.description: Distance per time (m/s, km/h); also bar velocity for VBT.

tokens.label: Cadence
tokens.description: Movement rate (cycling rpm, running spm, swim stroke rate); unit /min.
